THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEICKOSKI, DEBORAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2403 BRYANT, STAYED UNTIL JAN-16-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, ATTY FEES. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
